title: malleastrum gracile
intro: Malleastrum gracile is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. Malleastrum gracile has been reported to have various health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Malleastrum gracile may include essential oil extractions, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used in aromatherapy, topical applications, or as a natural remedy in traditional medicine.
